# GitHub mirror — read-only

This directory exists because GitHub conventions expect `.github/`. The
actual CI for this repo runs on git.psimaker.org — see
[`.gitea/workflows/`](../.gitea/workflows/). Don't add real CI here. The
workflow stubs in [`.github/workflows/`](workflows/) are intentionally
no-ops; they keep the GitHub Actions tab from looking broken.

> To work on this repo, clone from `git.psimaker.org/umut.erdem/homelab` if
> you have access; otherwise the mirror here is read-only.
